# Assignment Similarity System 🚀

A FastAPI-based backend system for detecting similarity between assignments, including **handwritten PDF submissions using OCR and AI-based similarity detection**.

---

## 🛠 Tech Stack

* FastAPI
* Uvicorn
* Pydantic
* JWT Authentication (python-jose)
* Passlib (bcrypt)
* Swagger UI (Auto-generated)

### 🤖 AI & OCR (New)

* TrOCR (Handwritten Text Recognition)
* Sentence Transformers (Semantic Similarity)
* PDF Processing (pdf2image, Pillow)

---

## ⚙️ Setup

```bash
python -m venv venv
venv\Scripts\activate   # Windows
pip install -r requirements.txt
```

---

## 🚀 Run Server

```bash
uvicorn app.main:app --reload
```

---

## 📘 Swagger UI

FastAPI automatically provides interactive API documentation.

### 📘 What is Swagger?

Swagger UI is an interactive documentation tool automatically generated by FastAPI.

It allows developers to test API endpoints directly in the browser without using Postman.

🔗 Access Swagger UI at:
http://127.0.0.1:8000/docs

You can:

* View all endpoints
* Test API requests
* Use JWT authentication
* See request & response schemas

---

## 🧠 System Workflow (Updated)

```
PDF Upload (Handwritten)
        ↓
Convert PDF → Images
        ↓
OCR (TrOCR)
        ↓
Extracted Text
        ↓
Semantic Similarity (Embeddings)
        ↓
Grading System
```

---

## 📁 Project Structure

```
BCE-P663/
│
├── backend/
│   ├── app/
│   │   ├── models/
│   │   ├── routes/
│   │   ├── services/
│   │   ├── ai/              # AI & OCR modules
│   │   ├── similarity_engine/
│   │   └── utils/
│   │
│   ├── uploads/
│   │   ├── assignments/
│   │   └── submissions/
│
├── frontend/
├── docs/
```

---

## 🔥 Features

* User Authentication (JWT-based)
* Assignment Management
* Submission Upload (PDF support)
* Handwritten Assignment Processing (OCR)
* AI-Based Similarity Detection
* Automated Grading System
* Swagger API Testing

---

## 🎯 Future Improvements

* Fine-tune OCR model using college dataset
* Improve handwriting accuracy
* Add plagiarism clustering
* Async processing for large files
